extraction.one_line_summary: WOODS won atop Thyon 2000 after THOMAS crashed within final 50 meters while contesting sprint, losing 21 seconds despite bridging late solo attack.
tactical_patterns: WOODS refused cooperation after THOMAS bridged 6km attack, gambling TT advantage would prevent yellow jersey trade-off.
THOMAS bridged solo to late breakaway survivor showing GC climbing form, immediately contested stage despite yellow deficit.
Breakaway duo CORT and PETILLI imploded final 3km when peloton surge fragmented cooperation before summit finish.
O'CONNOR finished third on stage marking THOMAS bridge while avoiding work, revealing conservative GC positioning over stage hunting.

rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: Confident enough in TT superiority over THOMAS to refuse cooperation after 6km attack was bridged, tactically mature.
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Bridged solo to breakaway remnants showing strong climbing despite crash losing time, aggressive GC racing not defensive.
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: neutral: Marked late moves for podium finish but avoided offensive tactics, playing safe GC card before time trial.
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: negative: Lost 33 seconds as pre-stage yellow jersey, unable to follow aggressive late pace set by THOMAS bridge.
